target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Building facade intact; all windows visible and undamaged; no visible structural deformation, missing sections, or debris; no signs of collapse or impact damage.

summary: Two buildings assessed show NO DAMAGE with CONFIRMED confidence; both appear structurally intact with undamaged facades, windows, and roofs. The overall scene depicts a city street with active traffic and large, intact buildings under an overcast sky. No relevant targets were assessed for functional impact as both assessed buildings show no damage.
